_comment: Phase 2 Optuna search space. Inherits from Phase 1 OFAT findings: drops dims with <2pp signal, narrows ranges around interesting regions, locks defaults that look optimal. Re-fill after final Phase 1 numbers land.

fitness._comment: Weighted composite of LTI-Bench sub-scores per parent plan §2. decay_trivial / core_persistence / revival are the headline metrics from paper Tables 8-9; the remaining 0.20 spreads across associative + contextual_retention so we don't accidentally regress them. All sub-scores are mean_f1 in [0,1].

search_space._comment: Post-Phase-1: associative_boost default (0.03) was anomalously bad — sweep narrowly around 0.05-0.07. base_decay_rates.semantic = 240 hit the highest f1; ceiling above untested — sweep to 400. core_session_threshold value=4 was anomalous; treat 1-3 as the search range. Other params locked at defaults per Phase 1 sensitivity.
